data.title: Countries across Africa approve new crypto laws as adoption grows
data.description:

data.title: 270K dormant Bitcoins move in 2025 – Are early whales cashing out?
data.description:
The old, dormant Bitcoin now seeing movement from wallets was mostly due to profit-taking activity, although some were also likely to be movement to cold storage for security purposes.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/270k-dormant-bitcoins-move-in-2025-are-early-whales-cashing-out/

data.title: A whale deposited 7,081 GIGGLE coins he had accumulated two weeks ago into Binance. If he sold them, he would have made a profit of nearly $700,000.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, about an hour ago, a whale recharged 7,081 GIGGLE to Binance, worth $1.61 million. Historical data shows that the whale accumulated these tokens two weeks ago, when they were worth about $925,000. If they were sold, the whale would have made a profit of nearly $700,000.

data.title: Canada to end anti-tariff ad after Trump halts trade talks
data.description:
The Premier of Ontario announced Friday that he will stop running television advertisements opposing American tariffs following President Donald Trump’s decision to cut off trade discussions with Canada. Doug Ford, who leads Canada’s biggest province, said he spoke with Prime Minister Mark Carney and chose to halt the advertising effort starting Monday. This move aims […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canada-to-end-anti-tariff-ad/

data.title: EU’s Urusula von der Leyen will ‘use every tool’ to defeat China in rare‑earth clash
data.description:
European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said on Saturday that Brussels will “use every tool” it has to counter China’s tightening control over critical raw materials, warning that the bloc is ready to respond if talks fail. Speaking at the Berlin Global Dialogue conference, Ursula said China has “dramatically tightened export controls over rare […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eu-vows-to-defeat-china-in-rare%e2%80%91earth-clash/

data.title: Wall Street expects Russia to find a way around Trump’s sanctions
data.description:
Wall Street isn’t fooled. Investors believe Russia will beat Trump’s new oil sanctions the same way Iran did; slowly, but quite effectively. The penalties slapped on Rosneft and Lukoil are serious. But nothing in oil trading ever stays blocked for long. Moscow has workarounds and plenty of patience. This week, Brent crude climbed nearly $5 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-will-find-a-way-around-us-sanctions/

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Tom Lee: Rising activity on the Ethereum chain may build momentum for the year-end market; 2. Paxos releases PYUSD forensic report: Total circulation exceeds 2.6 billion, a record high, up approximately 125.5% from August; 3. A certain address profited 760% in less than two days by trading PING; 4. Total open interest in GIGGLE contracts across the network exceeded $100 million, a record high; 5. CZ: Kyrgyzstan's national stablecoin and CBDC have been launched on BNB Chain, and the national cryptocurrency reserve includes BNB; 6. Ferrari plans to launch the digital token "Token Ferrari 499P"; 7. Glassnode: The reduction in BTC holdings by "Diamond Hand" has created greater resistance to price increases, and current bargain-hunting funds have failed to generate sufficient demand to absorb the selling pressure; 8. Yuga Labs announced that the metaverse Otherside will be launched on November 12; 9. Ethereum treasury company ETHZilla disclosed that its ETH holdings have increased to 102,916 coins, and will release its Q3 financial report on November 14.

data.title: U.S. and China may only reach a ‘tactical floor,’ not a strategic breakthrough
data.description:
Any trade deal between the United States and China will do little more than pause the bleeding. That’s the take from Charlene Barshefsky, former U. S. Trade Representative under Bill Clinton, who told the Bund Summit in Shanghai on Saturday that a temporary fix is all the world should expect right now. “A US-China deal, whatever […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-and-china-may-only-reach-a-tactical-floor/

data.title: Breaking: BlackRock, Fidelity Expand Bitcoin Holdings, Buy Worth $90,600,000
data.description:
BlackRock and Fidelity Investments increased their Bitcoin holdings on October 23, 2025, in the United States. They added $90. 6 million through their spot Bitcoin ETFs. This comes while overall trading activity slows
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/25/breaking-blackrock-fidelity-expand-bitcoin-holdings-buy-worth-90600000/
